expectations.text: Case focus is explicitly covered: review loop does not silently drop evidence-backed nodes
expectations.evidence: In result.md, the section "## Case focus coverage: “review loop does not silently drop evidence-backed nodes”" explicitly addresses this and cites Phase 5a requirements: "Coverage Preservation is a named contract requirement" and that Phase 5a review notes must include "## Coverage Preservation Audit" with per-node accounting, plus an acceptance gate that forbids accept while any coverage-preservation item is unresolved—making silent dropping non-compliant.

expectations.text: Output aligns with primary phase phase5a
expectations.evidence: result.md contains an explicit section "## Alignment with primary phase: Phase 5a" stating the benchmark targets Phase 5a and listing Phase 5a required outputs (review_notes, review_delta, qa_plan_phase5a draft), required sections including "## Coverage Preservation Audit", and Phase 5a routing constraints (accept/return phase5a). execution_notes.md also frames the assessment around verifying the Phase 5a contract/rubric.
